name: GFA Co., Ltd.
summary: GFA Co., Ltd. provides various financial services in Japan. It offers financial advisory services, including financial arrangement; mergers and acquisitions (M&A) services in the areas of acquisitions, sales, mergers, joint ventures, strategic capital, business alliances, etc. for domestic and overseas companies; and real estate liquidation and securitization services. The company also raises working capital for various needs, as well as for real estate purchases. In addition, it engages in rental, real estate trading and brokerage, and real estate mortgage activities. Further, the company invests in the IT field, including block chain technology, ICO, mining business, and AI fields. The company was formerly known as Ground Financial Advisory Co., Ltd. and changed its name to GFA Co., Ltd. in July 2012. GFA Co., Ltd. was founded in 2002 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
